entries.gt_3ee2ce2ba920f1: Don't light the stove. The gas has a temper today.
entries.gt_3fccf56a4430ed: New scratch on the shared cupboard. Remember the height.
entries.gt_3ff8e04bb1d3b2: The sink spat black. Don't touch your face.
entries.gt_4045d225690679: The glass is shaking with no footsteps. Step away from the window.
entries.gt_409ca2e1623522: Didn't live to hear the siren.
entries.gt_420d2b71895686: Put the child first. Adults know how to lie and say they can wait.
entries.gt_424437316a5612: Log later. Clear the corridor now.
entries.gt_42b46b0111202c: The child's chalk is shorter than a finger. The map is almost done.
entries.gt_42c72ae4c4193a: Keep the zinc bucket away from the white stuff.
entries.gt_431fceee9c734c: Seal checked. Don't touch the door.
entries.gt_44bb35ff2d20ec: If the lamp blinks, stay silent anyway!
entries.gt_455ce96a2ac522: Today's short version: check the water, close the door, stay quiet.
entries.gt_459a2761f75b4b: Lie there and don't get in the way.
entries.gt_45a651c639630f: Legs got us here. Now keep both eyes open.
entries.gt_45ff6ffdb04e88: Got here more intact than expected.
entries.gt_4687d873b8d50e: Right now we just sit it out!
entries.gt_4770648f49c883: Orderlies will pick it up later.
entries.gt_47e3f1603fa117: To the doors, before it's too late!
entries.gt_4842040ac50d10: Quiet. Someone's rummaging behind the radiator.
entries.gt_49561d4bd4e464: Save yourself and drag the others!
entries.gt_4a817940c0ab7b: To the stairs, if we make it!
entries.gt_4c5b3191337285: Made it here. That's already a win.
entries.gt_4d4b682d6e5445: Dear old concrete, nowhere else to go.
entries.gt_4d86d29730ca39: Someone else's mitten by the window. No second one.
entries.gt_4dc51b3e6b5cdf: One less noise in the corridor.
entries.gt_4e63f20e623833: Hold the door, not the handle!
entries.gt_4e97c3d73e9c8c: Keep the candle low so the neighbors don't argue.
entries.gt_514ec499c0eab2: Whoever's at the door, hold it tighter!
entries.gt_51837d7374ec9a: If your hand is black, it's soot. If it won't wash off, then we'll talk.
entries.gt_51b1338bd1069b: The fog will find you if you make noise.
entries.gt_5237d9297e9eef: Don't eat the soup if the cook hides his sleeves.
entries.gt_53152c63177e47: The wall is warm to the palm. Don't lean on it.
entries.gt_547a71bffc9b71: Old route, legs aren't new either.
entries.gt_548b08415bdd97: The can has bulged. Don't eat that even starving.
entries.gt_54adad90def6e3: At least the siren isn't screaming here.
entries.gt_54c30283d9bed3: Don't explain where it hurts. Show me what's falling off.
entries.gt_5733456032b5e7: Sit it out and don't twitch!
entries.gt_57383b59e5487b: Bandage on the handle. Not a souvenir, a warning.
entries.gt_57da662fe34c50: If you hear the siren, get inside fast!
entries.gt_58061b95fdedba: Everything's quiet for now, and good.
entries.gt_585ac31ae49875: The draft by the window smells sweet. Don't sniff too long.
entries.gt_588ad03ac13b27: Smoke is going down. I don't trust smoke like that.
entries.gt_597cba7d37f80e: The ceiling is shedding chalk. Don't stand under the seam.
entries.gt_59a7bd614310fd: Take the key out of the keyhole!
entries.gt_59bb5b5dad3d47: Back, if you want to live!
entries.gt_5a1df77b12c82b: Don't crawl under the bed, it won't save you!
entries.gt_5ae8b1c84e07fb: The neighbor is standing too straight. Call him by name from behind the door.
entries.gt_5b18b40fe7fa18: Press tighter to the inner wall!
entries.gt_5b7a45f34da207: Don't cough on the log. Then the log infects the whole round.
entries.gt_5c3042301bde9b: Ashtray full of water. The smoking room drowned today.
entries.gt_5d88a07bf0d225: Don't slow down, it'll catch up!
entries.gt_5e2744d0798761: The kitchen queue is rustling bags. Don't show your bread.
entries.gt_5e903cda3fb5e4: Push the cupboard against the door!
entries.gt_5f24aba996c06a: Empty for now, and that's good.
entries.gt_5f9ce2bef313eb: The queue isn't ours. We just know where it gets warmer food.
entries.gt_6082ea5faac4f8: The lock is dry. Means the door hasn't opened in a long time.
entries.gt_6108ad42508a9b: Siren's started, run to the hermodoor!
entries.gt_630731cb5aae57: Ladle's hot. The kasha went first.
entries.gt_6340aa6ebdad34: Floor doesn't seem to be floating. That's a plus.
entries.gt_6356b7fcfef3a2: This is slaughter, not a fight!
entries.gt_63605f3782fbee: The key rings with an extra tooth. The lock isn't ours.
entries.gt_6583ddee8e8d7a: While the siren howls, don't touch the door!
entries.gt_6776abf57f7882: A stranger's can by the hermodoor. Ask the name first.
entries.gt_682ebd38098bf8: Neighbor is laughing quietly. Means he found water.
entries.gt_685663c98aa057: Anyone left in the corridor can find another hermodoor!
entries.gt_6869ed375ba150: Whoever hides an infected one carries him later.
entries.gt_6bf61da010a2b9: After all-clear, don't pick up anything with bare hands.
entries.gt_6c6c2e1c5aeea7: At least the siren isn't screaming here.
entries.gt_6d11cdc10b5e2d: Fine then, we work from here.
entries.gt_6eb5c76e10b334: Don't be afraid alone. Together, the fog sounds quieter when it searches.
entries.gt_6f614962930783: Paper on the wall is fresh. The stamp has run.
entries.gt_7000189968800a: Elevator's warm again. I'm walking today.
entries.gt_7035b771aaa57e: A child's map on the wall. The kitchen is crossed out.
entries.gt_705f20347a1adb: The bolt creaks evenly. Good sound.
entries.gt_709cfc2a48a16e: Not one step into the corridor!
entries.gt_7245801c930edd: Made it alive. That's a holiday.
entries.gt_74865f20b4549a: Foam set badly. Close off the block.
entries.gt_75e928ba8346ad: In place. No need to run.
entries.gt_75f9fb5fbc9b76: Quiet for now. That's good already.
entries.gt_762b822c92718a: To the wall and shut up!
entries.gt_78ef16e8e871a3: Elevator light is green. Usually it lies in yellow.
entries.gt_790f820238e436: Children's chalk by the door. Step to the side.
entries.gt_79118f8f5d9bd8: Behind the door, fast. Check the second panel!
entries.gt_7a7a19bac77dc9: Kitchen smells fried. Stove is cold.
entries.gt_7a8b420b732984: Burn after roll call, no freelancing.
entries.gt_7ac68de2f25144: Keep the map dry. We'll sort the blood out later.
entries.gt_7afb4f3d3953cc: To the doors, while we can!
entries.gt_7b77ca46548fbe: Old man holds a key with no door. Let him keep it.
entries.gt_7c464bac5e81df: Mold grew into an arrow. Thanks for the hint.
entries.gt_7c8616b9bf73cc: Pipe knocks twice. Better leave before the third.
entries.gt_7db72500de7cbf: Candle wax under the table. They hid for a long time.
entries.gt_7fd9368a953e77: Neighbor dries a coupon on his sleeve. The lamp will eat it.
